video_title: Guy Fieri Eats a MASSIVE Plate of BBQ Meatloaf | Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives | Food Network

restaurants.name: Moat Mountain Smokehouse and Brewery
restaurants.guy_intro: I'm here to check out a joint where they came up here for the skiing to brew beer and to smoke meats and well they've been doing it for 22 years so I got to check it out. This is Moat Mountain Smokehouse and Brewery.

dishes.description: A blend of 80-20 ground beef and short rib, mixed with Cajun mirepoix (red and green bell peppers, onions), Austin barbecue sauce, Worcestershire, sour cream, garlic, parsley, black pepper, eggs, and panko breadcrumbs, formed into loaves, glazed with Austin sauce, and baked at 350 for about an hour and a quarter.
dishes.guy_response: That's great meatloaf. It's so tender, moist, full of flavor. Your Austin City barbecue sauce is wham bam.

dishes.description: Red bliss potatoes cooked in a steam kettle, mixed with roasted garlic in olive oil, melted butter, milk, kosher salt, black pepper, half and half, and sour cream, then whipped.
dishes.guy_response: Then you move over to the mashed potatoes which have an awesome amount of sour cream in them. Roasted garlic flavor all the way through.
